allow: Bash(awk -F= '/^VITE_SUPABASE_URL/{print "URL prefix: " substr\($2,1,12\) "...\(len " length\($2\) "\)"} /^VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY/{print "KEY prefix: " substr\($2,1,10\) "...\(len " length\($2\) "\)"}' .env)

Bash(awk -F= '/^VITE_SUPABASE_URL/{print \($2 ~ /^https:\\/\\// ? "URL https OK" : "URL NOT https !!"\)} /^VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY/{print \($2 ~ /^eyJ/ ? "KEY=legacy JWT \(eyJ\)" : \($2 ~ /^sb_publishable_/ ? "KEY=new publishable \(valid\)" : \($2 ~ /^sb_secret_/ ? "KEY=SECRET KEY!! \(wrong\)" : "KEY=UNKNOWN FORMAT"\)\)\)}' .env)
